title: [BUG] most headerFooter options get ignored
author: Zireael
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report
headerFooter is supposed to have the following options:
    firstHeader
    firstFooter
    oddFooter
    evenFooter
    oddHeader
    evenHeader

Only oddHeader and oddFooter partially work. oddHeader sets text in middle header for all pages. oddFooter sets text in middle footer on all pages.

Lib version: 4.0.1

## Steps To Reproduce

See JS code below. Save to xlsx file and open with Excel 20019

```javascript
  const workbook = new Excel.Workbook();
  var worksheet = workbook.addWorksheet("first", {
    views: [{ showGridLines: false }],
  });

  worksheet.headerFooter = {
    firstHeader: "Hello Exceljs",
    firstFooter: "Hello World",
    oddFooter: "Page &P of &N",
    evenFooter: "even footer",
    oddHeader: "oddHeader",
    evenHeader: "evenHeader",
  };

await workbook.xlsx.writeFile("./test1.xlsx");
```

## The expected behaviour:

Setting
```
    firstHeader
    firstFooter
    evenFooter
    evenHeader
```
should make some difference (ie header/footer text displayed on first and even pages)

comments.author: novsstation
EugeniyKiyashko
comments.body: I am getting the same behaviour.

comments.author: markeaston63
comments.body: Yes I am experiencing this issue also.

comments.author: chenop
comments.body:
Few Details:
I notice "Header & Footer" is a new feature - Updating to version 4.1.0 - showed the oddHeader.
firstHeader & firstFooter does not work.

Also in order to see the header you have to do the following in excel:
View --> "Page Layout" (You cannot see header in "Normal" Layout)

comments.author: yanickrochon
comments.body: I also have this issue. `firstHeader` and `firstFooter` are not showing in LibreOffice (have not tested with Microsoft Office). When going into the print preview of the document, the header is disabled and has no content.

comments.author: k4dm3l
aarbanas
comments.body:
> Hi everyone
> 
> I'm trying to add a header and footer to a worksheet but it doesn't work. Someone else finds how to solve this or how to add the header and footer to a worksheet? I'm using the next options object
> 
> ```
> const workSheet = workBook.addWorksheet('General Report', {
>       pageSetup: {
>         fitToPage: true,
>         paperSize: 9,
>         horizontalCentered: true,
>         margins: {
>           left: 0.1,
>           right: 0.1,
>           top: 1,
>           bottom: 1,
>           header: 1,
>           footer: 0.3,
>         },
>       },
>       headerFooter: {
>         oddHeader: 'TEST HEADER',
>         oddFooter: 'TEST FOOTER',
>       }
>   })
> ```
> 
> I'm the package version **4.2.1**. I try to follow this example but in my case does not work. ##1413
> 
> Thanks!

I'm having a same problem. I started thinking problem is in WorkbookWriter since I am using stream to create Excel file. Did somebody had a problem with Buffer also?

comments.author: eddejong
comments.body:
I had the same problem.
I found a simple workaround: define BOTH the ODD and EVEN headers with the same values ;-)
HTH & happy coding.
